title: RTX ON
description:
Bring your worlds to life with next-gen visuals.
RTX ON is a modpack focused entirely on delivering the most stunning graphics, realistic lighting, and immersive shaders for Minecraft. Whether you want cinematic screenshots or just to experience.
body:
**🌟 RTX ON – The Ultimate Shader Experience**

Bring your worlds to life with next-gen visuals.
RTX ON is a modpack focused entirely on delivering the most stunning graphics, realistic lighting, and immersive shaders for Minecraft. Whether you want cinematic screenshots or just to experience your survival world in breathtaking detail, this pack has everything you need.

✨ Features

🖼️ Ultra-realistic shaders – Hand-picked shaders that provide lifelike lighting, shadows, and reflections.

🌍 High-quality resource pack support – Optimized for HD and PBR textures to make builds shine.

💡 Ray-traced effects (where supported) – Global illumination, reflective surfaces, and glowing lights.

⚡ Performance-friendly options – Includes shader presets for both high-end and mid-range PCs.

🎮 Plug-and-play setup – No tweaking needed. Just install and play.

🚀 Perfect For

Players who love cinematic Minecraft.

Builders showcasing massive projects.

Anyone wanting to push Minecraft visuals to their limit.

🛠️ Requirements

A powerful GPU (RTX recommended for full effects).

Minecraft Java Edition.
